    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities with parameters of type ShipType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Board.canPlace(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Non-mutating check for whether a ship of the given type could be placed at the given head/orientation right now, without actually placing it.
    private void
    RandomFleetPlacer.placeOneShip(Board board, ShipType type)
    Attempts to place a single ship of type on board by trying random positions until Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation) accepts one.
    Ship
    Board.placeShip(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Validates and places a ship of the given type on the board.
    private List<Coordinate>
    Board.projectCells(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Projects the list of coordinates a ship of the given type and orientation would occupy, starting from its head cell.

    Constructor
    Description
     
    Ship(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation, Set<Coordinate> occupiedCells)
    Creates a ship of the given type occupying the given coordinates.

    ShipShapeFactory.createShipNode(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation)

    ShipShapeFactory.createShipNode(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation, String fillStyleClass)
    Creates the visual body of a ship, including the darker hit-point dots marking where each segment will show a hit marker later.
    static javafx.scene.image.ImageView
    SpriteOverlayFactory.createShipOverlay(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation)
    Convenience overload for a live (not sunk) ship overlay.

    SpriteOverlayFactory.createShipOverlay(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation, boolean sunk)
    Creates an ImageView overlay for a ship body sprite.
